famous quote:
Attitude, not aptitude, determines altitude.
-Zig Zigler
Interview Text:
Bill:

(part 2)

God told me that God was going to make his name renowned in the earth again, in 2014 and 2015. Even the non-believers feel there is something that we lack. Especially us who have figured out everything with our brains. But god is saying 'trust me because if you try to use your old operating system, it's not going to work.' He says 'I have a new operating system that I want you to try.' 

We've become more transactional with church services. 

Planning sex takes the joy out of it. Are you married? No. Well, you probably feel a natural desire for it, like loneliness. He's allowing our culture to become dissatisfied with what's available here. A very natural process, a hunger causes you to search for your answer.

My son has a frustration with how to workout because his iPhone always flops around. His brain is working on how to solve it. Maybe new shorts or something? 

You are creating the demand, so God will supply. 

But if you try and do it your way, it won't work.
Music Video Instructions: Listen to this as God telling you how much he loves you, and you him.
